title: Strawberry Yogurt Puree
description: Silky smooth blended strawberry and Greek yogurt — naturally sweet, protein-rich, and beautifully pink.

ingredients.item: plain full-fat yogurt or Greek yogurt

steps.instruction: If using fresh strawberries, hull and slice them. If using frozen, thaw fully first.
For fresh strawberries: briefly heat in a small saucepan with 1 tsp water for 3–5 minutes to soften.
Add strawberries and yogurt to blender.
Blend on high for 60 seconds until very smooth.
Stir in honey if desired. Add milk or cream if the consistency is too thick.
Serve immediately or refrigerate. Stir before serving.

notes: Greek yogurt provides great protein per serving. Full-fat yogurt gives a richer, creamier texture. This doubles as a great breakfast or snack.
